totals._note: avg = (weekday×5 + weekend×2) / 7 — update these whenever meal items change

recommendations.title: Improve VO2 Max
recommendations.detail: Currently 32.9 mL/kg/min — below average for age 39. This is the strongest single predictor of longevity. Zone 2 cardio and intervals are the main levers.

recommendations.title: Consider switching to dark chocolate (70%+)
recommendations.detail: Dark chocolate 70%+ has significantly less sugar than milk chocolate, and has meaningful evidence behind it: flavanols support cardiovascular health (improved blood flow, lower blood pressure), and there's reasonable data for cognitive benefits too. It's also more satiating per calorie, so 100 kcal goes further. Worth trying as a swap once the current fat loss phase is established.

planned.title: Fibre & Micronutrient Boost
planned.detail: 1 tbsp chia seeds in morning shake + 1 kiwi at ~3–4pm on weekdays. +~100 kcal/day, +~6g fibre/day. Adds vitamin C, calcium, magnesium, and prebiotic soluble fibre.

planned.title: VO2 Max Protocol
planned.detail: Structured Zone 2 cardio + intervals to move VO2 Max from 32.9 toward above-average for age.
